summary: Iteration 17 - Major Refactoring Tests Complete. All backend APIs working (11/11 tests passed). Frontend verified: new scoring system /100 with breakdown bars, new verdicts (GO/A_ETUDIER/DEFAVORABLE/EXCLU), commune search via chatbot, PDF export, map layers including future 400kV line. All features from the 9-step refactoring plan are working correctly.
passed_tests: === BACKEND API TESTS (11/11) ===
GET /api/ returns API info (version 1.0.0)
POST /api/chat works with simple query 'Trouve des parcelles en PACA'
POST /api/chat works with commune search 'Parcelles à Fos-sur-Mer'
New scoring system returns score with detail breakdown (distance_rte, mw_disponibles, plu, surface, malus)
New verdicts (GO/A_ETUDIER/DEFAVORABLE/EXCLU) returned correctly
POST /api/export/pdf works and returns valid PDF file
GET /api/map/rte-future-400kv returns GeoJSON with line + buffers (1km, 3km, 5km)
GET /api/s3renr/summary returns region data (IDF, PACA, HdF)
GET /api/map/electrical-assets returns 101+ postes HTB
GET /api/map/dc returns 61 DC existants
GET /api/map/landing-points returns 8 landing points
GET /api/map/submarine-cables returns 15+ cables
=== FRONTEND UI TESTS ===
Login page loads correctly with Google Auth button
Dashboard loads with map showing all infrastructure layers
Chatbot (Assistant IA) opens and accepts queries
Chatbot returns parcel results with new scoring structure
Score breakdown bars visible in chatbot parcel cards (RTE, MW, PLU, Surface)
Parcel cards show: score/100, verdict label, resume text, flags
Parcel detail panel shows DÉTAIL DU SCORE with breakdown bars
Google Maps links work from parcel references
Layers dropdown (COUCHES) shows all layers including 400kV Future
S3REnR summary visible in sidebar (IDF: SATURÉ, PACA: ACTIF, HdF: ACTIF)
Future 400kV line visible on map (red dashed line)
seed_data_creation: Created test user 'test-user-iteration17' with session for UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 17 verified the major refactoring (9-step plan). Key changes verified: 1) New scoring system compute_score_simple() returns universal /100 score with detail breakdown (distance_rte, mw_disponibles, plu, surface, malus). 2) New verdicts: GO (≥70), A_ETUDIER (40-69), DEFAVORABLE (<40), EXCLU (non-constructible). 3) Commune search via Geo API works in chatbot. 4) PDF export generates 'Fiche d'Opportunité' with new scoring. 5) ScoreBar component shows breakdown bars in chatbot and detail panel. 6) Future 400kV line Fos→Jonquières visible on map with buffer zones. All APIs are live (no mocked APIs).

refactoring_verification.step_1_scoring: VERIFIED - compute_score_simple() returns score/100 with 4 axes + malus
refactoring_verification.step_2_real_data: VERIFIED - S3REnR, fibre, Georisques, DVF data integrated
refactoring_verification.step_3_commune_search: VERIFIED - Geo API commune search works via chatbot
refactoring_verification.step_4_parallel_cache: VERIFIED - Parallel search + GPU cache implemented
refactoring_verification.step_5_map_layers: VERIFIED - All layers including future 400kV line visible
refactoring_verification.step_6_pdf_redesign: VERIFIED - PDF export returns valid 'Fiche d'Opportunité'
refactoring_verification.step_7_system_prompt: VERIFIED - New SYSTEM_PROMPT without project_type parameter
refactoring_verification.step_8_score_breakdown: VERIFIED - ScoreBar component shows breakdown in chatbot and detail panel

mocked_api_note: No mocked APIs - all backend endpoints are live with real data
